path.style: fill: #fff7f5; stroke-dasharray: 6,3.6; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke: #e8453a; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linejoin: miter
fill: none; stroke: #b7c0cc; stroke-width: 1.9; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #ec9a0e; stroke-width: 1.7; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #ec9a0e; stroke-width: 1.7; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #ec9a0e; stroke-width: 1.7; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #ec9a0e; stroke-width: 1.7; stroke-linecap: round

g.text: 每个索引独占 1 个 32B 块（块内 8 lane 重复同一索引值）
② 取数前给每个索引加行基址：实际读地址 = base + idx × elemSize
代价：单轮仅覆盖 8 个 b32 索引、输出按块重复，远慢于连续搬运——可连续搬运时不使用 gather；b32 数据配 u32 索引。
